tasks.title: Cloud Foundation
tasks.description: Establish the landing zone and core network.
tasks.validation: Verify VPC/IAM roles via cloud CLI.

tasks.title: Implement core-api
tasks.description: Primary API boundary for the system.
tasks.validation: Deploy core-api and run health check.

tasks.title: Security: Least privilege access
tasks.description: Ensure identities only have permissions required for their role.
tasks.validation: Evidence of role definitions + review cadence; policy-as-code checks where applicable.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Compliance scan report matches control objective.

tasks.title: Monitor SLO: API availability
tasks.description: Configure SLI for API availability with target 99.9%.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Alerting configured for API availability threshold.
